heroSection.profileImageAltText: Profile picture of Sabrina Poderis. I am a brown-skinned woman wearing black glasses, my hair is dyed blonde.
heroSection.AboutMeDescription: I am a Full Stack Developer with a strong focus on process organization and documentation. I have experience with React, React Native, and TypeScript. I have a special interest in frontend development, but with solid experience in backend and mobile development, constantly expanding my knowledge in the field. I possess skills in communication, collaboration, and continuous learning, always striving to optimize productivity and quality in software development.
